title: taraxacum hamiferum
intro: Taraxacum hamiferum, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family. The medicinal properties of Taraxacum hamiferum include its anti-inflammatory and diuretic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and fluid retention in the body. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support liver function, relieve digestive issues, and act as a natural remedy for skin conditions and allergies. Taraxacum hamiferum can be consumed as a herbal preparation, such as a tea or tincture, or used in capsule form to harness its medicinal properties and reap its numerous health benefits.
